content.en:
"I'm not qualified to work with you???"

The Stone Dragon Demon Lord was very annoyed, he was also a super-perfect controller, and he also had the means of infinite resurrection, why was he not qualified to cooperate with Ye Tian?

No matter how powerful Ye Tian is, he is only a super-perfect controller, and how powerful he is, it is not easy to say at present.

Besides, he found out here, but Ye Tian even refused to cooperate with him.

"Endless Lord, this crack was discovered first, if you don't cooperate with me, I will directly block this place and prevent you from passing!" the Stone Dragon Demon Lord threatened.

"Then you can block it!"

Ye Tian didn't care.

He has now dived into the Extreme Abyss, and there is still a replica body in the Extreme Abyss, so he doesn't need to use the crack of that Extreme Abyss to enter at all.

Therefore, the threat of the Stone Dragon Demon Lord was meaningless at all.

"You ......"

The Stone Dragon Demon Lord was stunned, could it be that Ye Tian had given up here?

It shouldn't be!

There are obviously unimaginable opportunities here, and it is a treasure land.

Now that Ye Tian's strength has skyrocketed and he has become a super perfect controller, he definitely wants to go in and explore, how can he give up?

"Damn, this guy won't wait until the perfect controller of the Void Realm to directly occupy this place and expel me!" the Stone Dragon Demon Lord thought to himself.

This seems like a big possibility!

But he didn't dare to cooperate with those perfect controllers of the Three Realms, otherwise the other party would not be able to give him many good things, and maybe kill him directly.

Moreover, now that many forces are rewarding him, he doesn't dare to come forward casually.

"At most, you can only find a super-perfect master, and it is an extremely powerful super-perfect master, let the other party make an extreme oath, and then take him into this treasure land. "

The Stone Dragon Demon Lord decided.

But who to find, it seems that it is risky to find anyone, so he has not found other super-perfect controllers to cooperate so far.

was threatened by Ye Tian before, so he brought him here, and he also wanted to cooperate with the other party.

As a result, Ye Tian actually wanted to swallow it alone, then he had to take a risk, and he couldn't get any benefits.

After thinking about it, the Stone Dragon Demon Lord thought of a super-perfect controller, and it seemed that only he would cooperate with him.

"Lord of the Blood Spirit!"

The relationship between the Stone Dragon Demon Lord and the Lord of the Blood Spirit was not very good, but they were partners a long time ago, but after he offended the other top powers, the Lord of the Blood Spirit saw that the situation was not good, and immediately broke off the relationship with him to prevent being liquidated by those top powers.

Now, countless years have passed, and the strength of the Blood Spirit Lord is much stronger than him.

Because he has been sealed by the major forces for endless years, the Lord of the Blood Spirit can always cultivate asceticly, plus the Lord of the Blood Spirit has a very good talent, and now he is already a top super-level perfect controller, which is definitely a good partner to work with.

"I didn't want to be the Lord of the Blood Spirit, but he also cooperated with me, even if he abandoned me once, if there was a huge benefit, this guy would definitely cooperate with me. Endless Lord Ye Tian, if you are not willing to cooperate with me, I will directly take all the benefits of this treasure land, and leave nothing for you at that time. "

The Stone Dragon Demon Lord said secretly.

He still didn't know about the existence of the Extreme Dao Deep Sea, and he only thought that this treasure land was a treasure land with a small area, and completely underestimated the Extreme Dao Deep Sea.

Otherwise, he knew very well that he was not qualified to take all the treasures of the Extreme Deep Sea.

......

The end of the world, the realm of blood spirits.

The world opened up by the Lord of the Blood Spirit in a treasure land here is also his lair, plus he has recruited many creatures and cultivators from the end of the world, creating a force that is not weak - the Blood Mad Sect.

this day.

The will clone of the Stone Dragon Demon Lord came to the Blood Spirit Realm, and the Lord of the Blood Spirit knew about it for the first time.

"Stone Dragon Demon Lord, you actually came to me?"

The Lord of the Blood Spirit was surprised.

He directly abandoned the Stone Dragon Demon Lord at the beginning, and no longer had entanglements with him, which can be said to have offended him, but he didn't expect him to come to him.

"Lord of the Blood Spirit, long time no see!"

The Stone Dragon Demon Lord said with a smile.

"Tell me, what's the matter, you are now wanted by the top forces of the Eternal Ruins, and you rashly appeared here with me, if you are discovered, I will be in trouble!"

The Lord of the Blood Spirit frowned.

"Lord of the Blood Spirit, you are still cowardly!" said the Stone Dragon Demon Lord disdainfully.

The Lord of the Blood Spirit didn't care about the contempt of the Stone Dragon Demon Lord, but said: "The Stone Dragon Demon Lord, although your strength is not good, you can't kill it, and you can resurrect it indefinitely, but I can't, I don't want to fall." Hurry up, what's the matter?"

"One more cooperation!"

The Stone Dragon Demon Lord proposed.

"Forget it, I won't cooperate with you, you can go!" the Lord of Blood Spirit refused.

The Stone Dragon Demon Lord was not surprised by the Blood Spirit Lord's answer, but he still said patiently: "This opportunity is far beyond the previous ones, there are all kinds of treasures, even the Extreme Dao Treasures that enhance the will, the treasures that enhance the Extreme Dao Strength, and the super perfect treasures are not lacking. Even for the perfect controller of the Three Realms, it was an unimaginable treasure land. "

"Such a good treasure, will you share it with me?"

The Lord of the Blood Spirit questioned.

The Stone Dragon Demon Lord said helplessly: "I can't continue to dig that treasure land now, and if I don't dig it again, that treasure land may no longer belong to me, so I need to find a super perfect controller to cooperate with as soon as possible, and the strength must be strong." Come to think of it, it seems that only you are the most suitable. "

The Lord of the Blood Spirit pondered for a moment before he said, "Are you sure there are really a lot of treasures there?"

"Of course I'm sure, I've even found the Extreme Treasure that transforms the Perfect Ancestral Endowment. The Stone Dragon Demon Lord introduced.

"I can work with you, but what are the benefits?"

The Lord of the Blood Spirit asked.

"Fifty-fifty divided, and we all have to make an extreme oath, after all, your current strength is much stronger than mine, if you don't make an extreme oath, I don't dare to take you there." The Stone Dragon Demon Lord said.

"Yes!

The Lord of the Blood Spirit agreed.

Immediately, both the Blood Spirit Lord and the Stone Dragon Demon Lord made an extreme oath.

Subsequently, the Stone Dragon Demon Lord informed some information about that treasure land.

After hearing this, the Lord of the Blood Spirit was indeed moved.

"Let's go, let's go to that treasure land together, it's the king to collect the resources as soon as possible!" the Lord of Blood Spirit urged.

Soon, the Stone Dragon Demon Lord took the Lord of the Blood Spirit to the mysterious entrance of the Extreme Deep Sea.

Whew!!

The will clone of the Blood Spirit Lord and the will clone of the Stone Dragon Demon Lord entered the Extreme Deep Sea without hesitation.

As soon as he entered the Extreme Deep Sea, the Lord of the Blood Spirit sensed the extraordinaryness here.

"This place...... It's really extraordinary, but I'm afraid that the resources here have been scraped by you!"

The Lord of the Blood Spirit exclaimed.

"I did take away the resources here, but the real good things must be in the depths of this treasure land, and we have to rely on the strength of you, the Lord of Blood Spirits, to go deep into the depths of this treasure land. The Stone Dragon Demon Lord said with a smile.

"Then let's move on!"

The Lord of the Blood Spirit was also looking forward to it.
